name: recoup-essentials
description: Get onto the Recoupable platform — setup, API keys, sandbox scaffolding, artist creation, and direct Recoup API access.

interface.shortDescription: Setup, API access, and artist onboarding for the Recoup platform
interface.longDescription: The starting-point plugin for Recoupable. Bundles the skills an agent needs to get onto the platform and stay productive: first-run setup and API key issuance, sandbox scaffolding, artist creation and enrichment, artist workspace file conventions, and direct Recoup API + connector access.
